summary: The user sought assistance in organizing their work schedule to include focused work sessions and buffer time for unexpected events. They also requested help in setting reminders for winding down at night and establishing a gym goal of attending at least three times a week for accountability.
facts: The user had a dentist appointment on Tuesday afternoon and worked from home in the morning to make up for lost time. The user is usually available to work from 9 am to 5 pm and prefers to schedule focused work sessions in the morning. The user aims for 2-3 focused work sessions per day, each lasting 90 minutes. The user has a meeting with a potential client every Monday at 10 am and a team meeting on Thursdays at 2 pm. The user decided to set a reminder to start winding down at 10:00 pm each night to prepare for a target bedtime of 10:30 pm. The user wants to go to the gym at least three times a week for accountability.
